text: The new water pipeline in our area finally fixed the daily shortage. Supply has been consistent for two weeks now.
author: sample_user

text: Third day in a row with no water in the morning. The tanker schedule is completely unreliable.
author: sample_user

text: पाणीपुरवठा सुधारला आहे, गेल्या महिन्याच्या तुलनेत खूप चांगली परिस्थिती आहे.
author: sample_user

text: Potholes everywhere after the rains. My commute has doubled and it is genuinely dangerous on a two-wheeler.
author: sample_user

text: Credit where due: the stretch near the main road was resurfaced quickly and it is smooth now.
author: sample_user

text: रस्त्यावर खड्डे खूप वाढले आहेत, दुरुस्ती कधी होणार माहित नाही.
author: sample_user

text: Traffic at the junction is unbearable during peak hours. We badly need better signal timing.
author: sample_user

text: The new metro line has genuinely cut my travel time. Clean, punctual and affordable so far.
author: sample_user

text: मेट्रोमुळे प्रवास सोपा झाला आहे, वेळेची बचत होते.
author: sample_user

text: Metro construction has blocked half the road for months with no clear deadline. Frustrating.
author: sample_user

text: Garbage has not been collected in our lane for over a week. The smell is terrible and it is a health hazard.
author: sample_user

text: The new segregation drive is working well in our society. Wet and dry waste is finally being picked up separately.
author: sample_user

text: कचरा वेळेवर उचलला जात नाही, स्वच्छतेची मोठी समस्या आहे.
author: sample_user

text: Allegations of a tender scam in the road contracts are deeply concerning. We need a transparent audit.
author: sample_user

text: Heard about bribes being demanded for routine building approvals. This corruption needs to stop.
author: sample_user

text: भ्रष्टाचाराच्या तक्रारींची चौकशी व्हायला हवी, पारदर्शकता गरजेची आहे.
author: sample_user

text: PMPML buses on my route have improved frequency. Waiting time has dropped noticeably.
author: sample_user

text: Public buses are overcrowded and frequently cancelled in the evening. Last-mile connectivity is poor.
author: sample_user

text: No parking discipline near the market and zero enforcement. It clogs the whole street.
author: sample_user

text: The riverfront development looks promising. If maintained well it could be a great public space.
author: sample_user

text: Smart city projects sound good on paper but I want to see actual delivery on the ground.
author: sample_user

text: विकासकामे सुरू आहेत पण गुणवत्तेकडे लक्ष देणे गरजेचे आहे.
author: sample_user

text: Air quality near the construction zones is getting worse. We need dust control measures urgently.
author: sample_user

text: Tree plantation drive in the neighbourhood was well organised and many residents participated.
author: sample_user

text: Street lights have been repaired across the area, the evening commute feels much safer now.
author: sample_user

text: Drainage overflows every monsoon at the same spot. The same complaint every year and no permanent fix.
author: sample_user

text: The municipal grievance app actually resolved my water complaint within 48 hours. Pleasantly surprised.
author: sample_user

text: Footpaths are encroached everywhere, pedestrians have nowhere to walk safely.
author: sample_user
